package rulefixtures

// scenario for make_map_inside_hot_loop_same_shape: make(map[K]V, ...) scratch maps recreated inside loops instead of being reused or prebuilt.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule354NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario354Negative(records []Rule354NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
